text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 
61 
EXCLUDED_DRUGS 
LABEL: 
Indicates Whether Part D Plan Covers Excluded Drugs 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether any excluded drugs are part of the Part D plan's supplemental 
coverage (e.g., benzodiazepines, barbiturates). 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
Y = Yes 
N = No 
9 = Not Applicable 
COMMENT: 
This variable applies to
